name: GCP Cloud Identity / IAM

auth.notes: Service accounts require domain-wide delegation enabled in Google Workspace Admin console. The service account impersonates an admin user. OAuth client credentials are not supported; use service account JWT assertion flow.

api.rateLimits: Admin SDK Directory API: 15 requests/second, 150,000 transactions/day per project (courtesy limit). Can be increased via Google Cloud Console quota management.

scim.notes: SCIM provisioning is supported through Workforce Identity Federation for syncing users/groups from external IdPs. Supports /Users and /Groups endpoints. Group provisioning via SCIM requires Gemini Enterprise. API returns max 100 resources per response.

additionalPackages.adminSdkImport: import { google } from 'googleapis'; const admin = google.admin('directory_v1')

sdk.notes: For user provisioning, the primary SDK is the 'googleapis' npm package which provides access to the Admin SDK Directory API. @google-cloud/iam is for IAM policy management, not user provisioning.

webhooks.notes: Admin SDK supports push notifications via the watch mechanism. You register a webhook URL and receive notifications when users/groups change. Cloud Audit Logs can also be used with Pub/Sub for event-driven workflows.

sandbox.notes: Google Cloud offers a free tier with $300 in credits for 90 days. Cloud Identity Free edition supports up to 50 users. Google Workspace also offers a 14-day free trial.

needs_verification: Exact Cloud Identity API rate limits (separate from Admin SDK)
Whether @google-cloud/iam package covers Cloud Identity group/membership operations or if googleapis is required
SCIM endpoint URL format for Workforce Identity Federation
Push notification webhook event type names (may differ from listed names)
